content: Yeah it did happened like 2 months ago
Then why is this happening now?
Did they just
A bit confused too that they release something like that this late
Forget
Not sure
if you look at the timestamp on the starting post of this thread, it's from november 6th 2025
Ohhhhhhh
so there was clearly a delay
Thank you dear Lens
can't say why there was one but yeah it refers to the game's 2nd anniv
When is the next event I want freebies...
Idk why villa pinged everyone now for something 2 months before
Probably in like 7 days or so
It's also the timing where Xu event expire
Next unit should be Aequor
I'm worried about powercreep, GMurphy which is positioned as a support type deals more damage than Daffodil who is positioned as an attack type

Tbh I never felt like there was any anniversary - there was no real anni event (character selector and 200 pulls are just afk tabs for me), and raid, although was nice in terms of rewards - is just lazy copy-paste of previous iteration. 
TLDR: rewards and rotational banners are nice, ani event is non existent.

Coming from Mihoyo gacha games, seeing so many pulls given during anniversary was a shocker. The one day banners were also incredible thing to see and I would love to see other flash banners in the future for other special occasions. That being said, it did feel like there wasn't any real event besides the login banners which was a bit of a disappointment but at the same time, I just started playing so I had plenty of things to do in the meantime but I feel it would feel much more different if I was a more enfranchised player
For the love of the big eye, let us farm soulforge mats with our stamina
and let it be mergeable
peak
Aside from the mishap of the raid-like event I had fun with the story (I ACTUALLY LIKED THIS ONE, WHICH IS RARE), loved how generous it was as well.
i like the pfp rewards. i want more profile customization stuff even if its paid.
also send more people to balance traphase
we are perishing here
It was peak.

I NEED .MORE STANDARD PULLS
Wheel Jail is rough..
哈吉咪不要再搞怪了
Pens + Seals too
Wheel jail = the suck 🙁

I started out just about when the second Anni (including the 200 pulls for clearing up to Arc 2 - Chapter 4 dropped) and it was pretty good all things considered, the main "issue" is that you really need to look up external guides if you want to not get screwed over as the games internal documentation is not amazing. Also the access to gear sets/cov's early on is a bit shite.

👉👈 can
Can i get e3 +12 for free?
Otherwise very fun game, great story.
Me too fr

It would be so cool for them to give, may
Maybe a kiss will be given
https://tenor.com/view/cat-cat-blush-silly-cat-juice-cute-gif-6133838172443289075
Liked the anniversarry event.  Wished we would have had a couple of more days for each of the anni banners
trasphase balance, mergeable soulforge mats, more event rewards, than just 5 pulls... selecteable standard ssr like the wheels...
I wanna +12 my kath❤️
Agreed
I liked the unit selector for the 200 posse uses, number seemed big but you could get it done surprisingly quickly after playing. Good balance on ammount needed for that imo

I mostly like everything. Events were cool, characters are great, and the generous rewards are appreciated. Only, I wish rewards weren't tied to completing the main story. I liked going through the missions at my own pace, and rushing to catch up so I could get the rewards felt bad.

200 limited pulls were too much good plus all the other freebies.

Sadly I didn´t like Gmurphy as anni character and her design cause of the umbrella.
agree, having to rush to chapter 4 of arc 2 is rough.... it should be chapter 2 at most..

Cons: 

- Some of the level difficulty for like some event story fights are loke very difficult especially for new players depending on the mechanic
- less emojis more pfp as freebies
- pens, seals and soul forge should have more reliable farming points
- that 200 free pull story pass reward should of been longer some stories difficulty is a little insane.

My biggest gripe too
I feel like the Archive, while always expanding for the better to let us get new sights at relics n all, needs MORE.
Traphase recently already got an amazing glossary for everything buried inside of it, even the things you don't own and thats great! The basegame needs the same as well!

Amazing Annivserary nonetheless and I will definitely be celebrating each subsequent one onward, even after its eventual death and offline release

Early game covenants are shite indeed. Or super super niche.

Good thing you don't need em until you get decently deep into the mid game.

I just rocked the uuh first farmable set where it gives you 1 max arith

Pros: 

- good designs
- great writing reminds me of the heavy story lore fgo and r1999 has which I enjoy 
- pity doesn't feel too bad
In comparison to other Gachas I'd say the pity is insanely low
Add on the universal dupe
Starting out right before GMurphy and getting access to a tentacle team did make the early game a looot easier I feel.
That's just tentacles in general
The Aequor realm and counter really messes up early game enemies
I'm sure Caro/Chaos/Ultra can clear it, but tentacles, especially GMurph makes it far more comfy, especially act 2 as it has such massive synergy.
Also Pot of Greed

Caro (I started and mained it)

Can be slow but you will never die
I actually couldn't do arc 2 ch 4, Missed the 50 pulls of it TvT

Back to ani topic tho.

I just want them to implement what we said from previous Ani talk
Like just lock players to 5 runs and no more. And give the reward AFTER you had participated in killing the boss numbers
Yh same, I timed out on the final boss fight
Instead of a clear
What's this about the 5 runs? D-Tide?

I don't know if this referring in general to all events and stuff that have been done during the year or in particular to the Raid event, but, i will still share what the community already given as a feedback before regarding that, i already shared it with Light, but is good to remind to remember and avoid doing those mistakest again (for the 3th time).
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1445154383858761881

17 run if you had all awakeners at the time
And the rewards were no joke

<@1280986327659188334> no but, for real, what event in particular are we talking about? the Raid?
Before we vote on the pool.

Also one thing it REALLY valuable in there was the XP

You were getting xp from the runs
Man, I regret skipping it now (even if I was too fresh to play it)

I just consider they are talking overall for the ani patch


So uh a 4/5 at best cause the ani raid was god awful but it also had so many good QoL added to the game and it's systems it keeps it from dropping lowrr
If you had a tiny roster. You were just gonna get one or two battles a day and that's jt
that is the problem, if they are only talking a bout the raid, it was full of problems, but a lot of people are probably voting for the whole thing
Is that not ideal?
It just wasn't well done
The raids sucked, but everything else was great
Ahh, that's understandable then
i really don't whant them to think that the raid was a possitive event
We must band together to abolish the raid events

No. This raid. Was limited in the ways that. You had to have many awakeners.

And you could farm it a lot. Issue came that... Everyone just ended up nuking bosses in like 1 day or even less
So not only were there limited number of bosses. There were too many people just turbo beating them
Just let each Raid Stage be a Participation Reward (which can then be perpetually raised by accumulated Clears from all Players)
It was a "the rich get richer" event

2nd anni had alot of QoL the story was good and it had good rewards, satisfied with everything other than the raid event which was my 3rd most disliked event just behind the other 2 times it showed up, i think it could work but honestly its better off working for a better replacement tbh
Man, that sounds so unfair
We added that to suggestions
TYY
I busted my ass on that event

Not me 😭 

As a community
Sure sounds like it
we litterally already had all similar discussion laid out before already https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1445154383858761881

I think the fact you can't use duplicate supports was poorly implemented, as well as having a server-wide cap. It should be like other traditional raids where it's open for a specific time period and you get X amount of tries per day
Sounds like you've been through the trenches
Oh fr? Good to hear
I understand they wanted to farm retention but like. Id say the Thais event farmed far more retention out of peiple
Cause double affinity
I got like 30 or so awakeners to affinity 15
Being able to farm Pens was nice too
yeah, that is why i'm confused why they are seeking feedbacks now, and that is not well explained what part of the event people are voting for

Also, I kind of want there to be anniversary livestreams when Light gets the budget for it, so we can hear them talk about the game and it's future, as well as see visual teasers of upcoming content. Although, it's nothing serious, it would be nice
I mean, it seems more like them only asking feedbacks later than sooner (and only after the damage has already been done) is a recurring issue

Boss dying before even 1 day making people unable to play, only able to use supports once while being forced to use them, mostly extremely easy fights (i kinda used auto mode after 8 battles), and needing to do the bosses 17 times for optimal clear while also being only the eye boss was really just a grind party without any fun
The rewards was good for sure, barely any gacha would ever give something close to that but i prefer something fun
yeah, i'm ok to them asking feedbacks, i only would have liked if the pool wasn't to generic, but it asked for each specific part of the anni instead
For the rest, the free rewards were good, the 200 posse one, the freebees, the rotating banners etc
The QoLs
Lots of em
Finally English translation too
Really if raid never existed. 5/5

Yeah, it would have been nice if Events didn't end an hour before a Banner ends so that people could have had just a tiny bit more time to clear the Main Story for the free Pulls and it would have also been nice if we could choose who we want (up to 6 which locks in place) from the Anniversary Banners rather than have them rotate daily
It really was a very good event for a person who has the time to bother with it. Like insane reward quantities

I started playing during the anniversary event (on Thais rerun) and I can't compare it to the quality before the event, but the quality of the game in that current state was far beyond what I was expecting, making me play a lot since then and enjoying every bit of content Morimens provided. The translation is done very good, especially since I heard it was MTL before due to lack of resources. I wish the BIAV and your project the best, thank you
Machine translation is the right word
MTL, not enough proof reading feels just a tad bit more accurate imo

I haven't gone back myself to re read the story after the update. But hey atleast they stopped calling Jenkins a he 🙂

As long as future ones are being translated well I don't mind the small bumps
Yeah, that's fair then
Jenkins being referred to with male monikers definitely didn't help much because she looks like a boy which really threw me off
the problem is, that it wasn't fun specifically for the time you had to invest

Man. I forgor.

But I'm 100% misgender even after this moment
is not good engagement if you either put it to auto to clear 17 time a day
My issue with it was that if you had a life. The boss could be just... Dead
I remember the day 1, in less than 3 hours the boss was half dead
still, all this has been already discussed at the time, i only hope they do listed to that
That definitely did wonders for my psyche
everything was good except the raids. wish it worked more like azur lane where the community worked together to hit milestones rather than a free for all to get as rewards as possible
anyway, loved this game, _especially_ the attitude towards its audience, gacha system, and the market in general. Great experience
TYPE SHIT
that sort of free for all raid works when combat is braindead like in fgo, but here, it takes a long time to do just one raid
Oh god fgo... I played it for a bit only cause of a friend. I grinded on the current lotto thing like 100k
And the uuh Japanese samurai thing was just god awful farm experience
Idk how the people put up with those
I understand people play to for the story. But I myself just couldn't get into it. Idk 😐
Like story is important and all but if the gameplay loop is just tiring, people will leave at that point

Things I liked: 
- Having all units in the past year rerun, I started around the Kathi banner but there were a lot of units I liked released right before her. For newer players, knowing that all units rerun during anni is pretty good incentive to start imo
- The translation is no longer MTL!!! I've been putting off a lot of story stuff because I didn't want to read MTL so this is a game changer.
- new traphase mode ❤️
Things I did not like:
- raid event was a slog 🙁
- I'd already gotten through some of arc 1 with a well built team so it wasn't too hard to get most of the anni rewards but a little intimidating for newcomers maybe
- maybe it's just me and my device but ping is crazy high and I keep getting paused or disconnected. I've kind of stopped playing as much because of that (though I'll always come back)

I love how much the devs clearly love their game, and I love the continued reassurance that even if the game goes eos they'll make an offline version ;.; 

Also, anni livestream when. I want to hear light talk about the game lmao
The more frequent reruns were good, do that more often.

The last part its possible in combination.

Like somehow my pc performance on the game is eh.
While phone is fine.

MEANWHILE limbus plays well on pc and meh on phone
Like If I'm playing on pc Morimens it's for reading and story stuff
Phone for gameplay related, daily stuff
I'm like on permanent 300 or so ms
I've mostly been on tablet, so maybe I'll try downloading it on my phone and see if it gets better
Well, I say phone cause I assumed phone. Tablet is the same I assume
I'm fine with it being a little slow, but it's kind of difficult to play the game if it keeps disconnecting haha
Maybe mess around with the graphics
Idk about disconnecting, never had that issue :/
Not sure of your location but maybe weak internet signal
Yeah, maybe, I'll probably have to test with what I have here and hope for the best

Pros :
- Massive rewards of like around 600 limited pulls worth during the update
- Arc 2 mats for soul forge no longer locked behind leaderboard ranking
- Some QoL updates


Cons :
- Murphy : Fauxborn's forehead nerfed
- Raid event rerun
- Pdive became whale content
- Traphase got another mode that require more RNG than previous game mode
- Arc 1 story chapters difficulty balancing : nerf of chapters effects and buff of enemies
Veteran won't really bother going back to arc 1 so why buff enemies anyway?
didn't they nerf the story?
They buffed them instead
Before hard mode chapter 9 final boss only had like 1m hp phase 2
the only nerf was on the full hand breeading of chapter 8
Now it have like 2.4m hp

in theory we got a lot of nice stuff, in practice it was annoyingly gated behind unreasonable levels of effort (having to do a ton of raid runs daily, lots of pulls locked behind deep/catching up to the story) 

even the free SSR didn’t feel very good because most characters weren’t designed to function at base
that is hard mode, normal was nerfed
I wouldn't be surprised if most people used fga to auto it
But the chapters buff also got nerfed too so it counter balance
only the breeding of chapter 8 was nerfed
The purple orisson and red orisson got nerfed
but other things were all nerfed, pluss they hadded the special effects on the chapters connected to the realms
Red now only give you like 2 or 3 copy
Instead of full hand
the red was honestly broken for a select few unit, now is at least more usable for more
Purple only give you 5 max

Maintain some sort of challenge.

I remember when ch6 seeing that big ass bar and a tentacle for the first time. It really felt epic.
Instead of reshuffling everything into other buff cards
With same ratio amount of cards reshuffled
Tbh chapter 6 was a joke for me, i don't even properly remember it even with caecus nautila pandia murphy team
Other have limited so they could speedrun it faster
Stuff like mouchette or gmurphy
If they buff those difficulty then it should be fine to some extent
But not chapter 8 or 9
Chapter 9 have like 8 stages where you have 0 relics play
Just remember that arc 1 can be easy as long as you relic cheese
But if you fight stages without relics then it's entirely relying on team
Or need to gnosis which is not that enjoyable in gameplay style i guess
techincally you don't use the chapter gimmick in 9
you have the things that the eyes give you, not the orisons
Hmmm
plus, they lowered the general level of all enemies, in normal
Well
Only Hard mode got shafted i guess?
more or less
but hard mode arc1 and 2 are separate
plus, if the normal is more easy, we need a difficult mode
Tbf it would throw off anyone
The normal mode eye only have like 400k hp phase 2 if i remember correctly
If they nerfed it then it would be even less
Now in hard mode they gave it +2m hp
The gap is just too big
I also have this issue, I'm in Europe.
I also had some problems with ping but I assumed it was due to VPN because I play from Russia

another thing I really liked as a new player in the anniversary is the draft traphase. It provides an engaging and fun way to learn the traphase cards and skills without having to read and remember tons of cards before the first battle and it is a fun mode for more chill, lore investment traphase experience
altho one time my internet disconnected _before the game started_ (before we hit "ready") and when I came back it still counted as points loss for some reason
Faster loading screen and Optimization for lower end device

that was normal mode
if hard mode final boss only had 1m hp it wouldn't have been nearly as hard
